schema.appDescription: Calculate monthly pension income from an annuity investment. Compare life annuity, return of purchase price (ROP), and joint life options.

options.label: Return of Purchase Price (ROP) on death

howToSteps.name: Enter your details
howToSteps.text: Fill in the input fields for the Annuity Calculator.

howToSteps.name: View instant results
howToSteps.text: Results update in real time as you type.

howToSteps.name: Explore breakdown
howToSteps.text: Open the year-by-year breakdown to see numbers over time.

howToSteps.name: Compare scenarios
howToSteps.text: Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and optimise your decision.

faq.q: What is an annuity and how does it work in India?
faq.a: An annuity is a contract where you pay a lump sum to an insurance company and receive regular pension payments (monthly/quarterly/annual) for life or a fixed period. In India, annuities are offered by life insurers like LIC, SBI Life, HDFC Life. NPS mandates 40% of corpus into annuity at retirement.

faq.q: What is the annuity rate in India 2026?
faq.a: Annuity rates in India range from 5.5% to 7% p.a. depending on the insurer, annuity type, and purchase age. Immediate annuity rates are higher for older buyers. LIC's Jeevan Akshay VII offers 6–7% for single life annuity. HDFC Life and SBI Life offer comparable rates.

faq.q: Is annuity income taxable in India?
faq.a: Yes. Annuity income is fully taxable as 'income from other sources' at your applicable slab rate. There is no special exemption for annuity income. This is different from EPF/PPF maturity which can be tax-free. Factor in tax while planning your retirement income from annuities.
No. Calculations run in your browser.
Yes. Works on all modern smartphones.

examples.heading: ₹20 lakh NPS annuity corpus at 6%
examples.text: ₹20 lakh annuity at 6% (life annuity): ₹10,000/month = ₹1,20,000/year. With Return of Purchase Price (ROP): ₹8,500/month (lower payout, but family gets ₹20 lakh on death). Joint life with ROP: ₹7,800/month — spouse also protected.

examples.heading: ₹50 lakh corpus — comparing options
examples.text: ₹50 lakh single life annuity at 6%: ₹25,000/month. With 3% increasing: starts at ₹22,000/month, reaches ₹37,000 after 20 years. If you live 20+ years, increasing annuity wins against inflation. Buy at least 40% of annuity corpus with inflation-increasing option.
